events.title: The Wizard of Oz (Spring Musical) — Performance
events.location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
events.description:
Woodside High School Drama Department Spring Musical performance of “The Wizard of Oz.”

Showtime: Friday, April 3, 2026 at 7:00 PM.
Doors open 30 minutes before showtime. Concessions available at intermission.
Tickets: Adults $15; Students/Seniors $10; Children under 5 free. Purchase online at woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door (cash/card accepted).
